  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the purpose of the toArray() method in Java?",
      "options": ["A) To convert a list to an array", "B) To convert an array to a list", "C) To convert an object to a string", "D) To convert a string to an object"],
      "correct": 0,
      "explanation": "The toArray() method is used to convert a Collection or an Iterable to an array. This method can be useful when you need to pass an array to a method that expects an array as a parameter."
